project.name: Hero: The Open-Source EUC: Why Makers Are 3D Printing Their Own Wheels

data.label: Style
data.name: w33s3 Dark + Urban
data.description: Noir comic book illustration style. Heavy black ink lines, high contrast shading, cel-shaded shadows. Hand-drawn graphic novel aesthetic with bold outlines. Moody urban atmosphere with rain-slicked streets, neon reflections, dusk or night lighting. Muted palette with selective color pops (electric blue, amber). Stylized, not photorealistic. No text, watermarks, or white borders. Edge-to-edge composition.

data.label: Setting
data.description: Urban street scene at dusk, rain-slicked asphalt with neon reflections, city backdrop

data.label: Action
data.content: Maker workshop workbench with 3D printed electric unicycle shell components, STM32 circuit boards, MPU6050 sensors, lithium battery cells arranged in parallel, soldering iron, caliper, and a partially assembled DIY wheel motor in the foreground, amber workshop lighting, cables and wires, organized chaos

data.label: Negative
data.content: photorealistic, photograph, bright daylight, sunny, text, watermarks, blurry, low quality, cluttered, amateur
